title: telis macrorrhyncha
intro: Telis macrorrhyncha, also known as the 'tall' or 'large-throated' Telis, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is traditionally valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The roots of Telis macrorrhyncha are rich in bioactive compounds, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's roots are typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies and supplements.
